text: “Increased stay-at-home or increased soft refusal? A comparison of time-use and household travel surveys in Japan” was published in Transportation Research Procedia, volume 97, pages 151–161.
Two studies on response diligence and trip reporting were published in Travel Behaviour and Society and Transportation Research Part A.
Presented research on item nonresponse and trip underreporting at the 72nd Infrastructure Planning Conference in Fukui, Japan.
Presented research on item nonresponse and trip underreporting at Kobe University.
Published a study of mobility disparities in time-varying multimodal networks in Physica A, volume 681, article 131060.
Began Ph.D. study in Engineering and joined the JST SPRING Program at Kumamoto University.
